name: Grow My Farm
author: Poki
description: Grow My Farm is a simulation game where you run your very own farming business! Plant seeds, water them, watch your crops grow, then harvest your fresh produce to sell in the store. Use your earnings to buy more seeds and expand your farm. Ready to grow, harvest, and prosper? How to play Grow my Farm? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Press the number keys to get the right items, and left click to use them. Who created Grow my Farm? Grow my Farm is created by emolingo games. Play their other games on Poki: Car Machines , Escape From Spider , Disaster Arena , Draw my Path Obby , Escape From School , Rainbow Obby and Sword Masters ! How can I play Grow my Farm for free? You can play Grow my Farm for free on Poki. Can I play Grow my Farm on mobile devices and desktop? Grow my Farm can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Grow my Farm with my friend? Yes! Grow my Farm is a multiplayer game so you can play it with your friends online!
